book.title: The Unsteady Child
book.author: Marion Albrecht
book.note: Primary reference for the sensory play curriculum, chapter on postural foundations.

book.title: Building Blocks of Sensory Integration
book.author: D. Whitfield
book.note: Assessment and goal writing framework used with new intakes.

book.title: Handwriting Foundations for Young Learners
book.author: P. Reyes
book.note: Grading strategies for letter formation, ages 4 to 8.

book.title: Feeding the Cautious Eater
book.author: L. Stein
book.note: Recommended after the feeding session at the fall conference.

journal.title: The Journal of Pediatric OT Practice

flaggedArticles.article: Evidence update on sensory integration outcomes
Telehealth models for rural pediatric therapy

book.title: Summer Crossing
book.author: Sarah Dessen
book.note: Evening wind down after curriculum writing.

book.title: The Overstory
book.author: Richard Powers
book.note: Pairs with the cottage garden season, finished last winter.

book.title: The Watercolor Garden
book.note: Used for fine motor and painting time together.

book.title: Sky Colors
book.note: Color mixing ideas for Sunday afternoons.
